title: Static value rebuilt every render
message: `data` inside `MyAnimation` uses no local state but is rebuilt every render, so it looks new each time & breaks memoized children. Move it to the top of the file, outside the component.
help: Move the value above the component, at the top of the file. It doesn't use local state, so rebuilding it each update is wasted and makes it look new every time.
